name: GasLog LP. 8.75% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preference Shares
summary: GasLog LP. 8.75% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preference Shares represents a preferred equity security issued by GasLog LP. These shares pay a fixed dividend rate of 8.75% and have no maturity date, although they may be redeemed by the issuer. GasLog LP is a company engaged in the ownership, operation, and acquisition of liquefied natural gas (LNG) carriers.
